{{infobox football tournament season
|title           = Copa do Brasil
|year            = 2010
|other_titles    = Copa Kia do Brasil 2010
|image           =
|imagesize       = 250px
|caption         = 
|country         = Brazil
|dates           = February 10 - August 4
|num_teams       = 64
|champions       = {{flagicon|São Paulo}} [[Santos FC|Santos]]
|runner-up       = {{flagicon|Bahia}} [[Esporte Clube Vitória|Vitória]]
|matches         = 116
|goals           = 340
|top goal scorer = [[Neymar]] (11 goals)
|player          = [[Paulo Henrique Ganso|Ganso]]
|prevseason      = [[2009 Copa do Brasil|2009]]
|nextseason      = [[2011 Copa do Brasil|2011]]
}}

The '''2010 Copa do Brasil''' was the 22nd edition of the [[Copa do Brasil]], starting on February 10 and ended on August 4. It was contested by 64 clubs, either qualified through their respective state championships (54) or by the [[Brazilian Football Confederation|CBF Rankings]] (10). Clubs that qualified for the [[2010 Copa Libertadores]] did not take part because of scheduling conflicts.

==Format==
The competition is a [[single elimination]] [[knockout tournament]] featuring [[two-legged tie]]s. In the first two rounds, if the away team wins the first match by 2 or more goals, it progresses straight to the next round avoiding the second leg. The [[away goals rule]] is also used in the Copa do Brasil. The winner qualifies for the [[2011 Copa Libertadores]], which prevents a team from winning the Copa do Brasil twice in a row.

==Team information==
===Qualified by state championships and other competitions===
54 spots in the tournament are allocated to all the 27 State federations to indicate either one, two or three clubs, depending on their status in [[Brazilian Football Confederation|CBF]] State ranking.<ref>{{Cite web |url=http://www.cbf.com.br/ranking/ranking_uf.pdf |title=CBF State Ranking - official site |access-date=2009-05-04 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20091014095018/http://www.cbf.com.br/ranking/ranking_uf.pdf |archive-date=2009-10-14 |url-status=dead }}</ref> Criteria may vary, but usually state federations indicate clubs with best records in the state championships or other special competitions organized by such institutions.

{| class="wikitable"
! State
! Team
! City
! Qualification method
|-
| {{flag|Acre}} || [[Atlético Clube Juventus|Juventus]] || [[Rio Branco, Acre|Rio Branco]] || 2009 [[Campeonato Acreano|State Championship]] winners
|-
| rowspan="2" | {{flag|Alagoas}} || [[Agremiação Sportiva Arapiraquense|ASA]] || [[Arapiraca]] || 2009 [[Campeonato Alagoano|State Championship]] winners
|-
| [[Sport Club Corinthians Alagoano|Corinthians Alagoano]] || [[Maceió]] || 2009 [[Campeonato Alagoano|State Championship]] runners-up
|-
| {{flag|Amapá}} || [[Sociedade Esportiva e Recreativa São José|São José]] || [[Macapá]] || 2009 [[Campeonato Amapaense|State Championship]] winners
|-
| rowspan="2" | {{flag|Amazonas}} || [[América Futebol Clube (AM)|América]] || [[Manaus]] || 2009 [[Campeonato Amazonense|State Championship]] winners
|-
| [[Nacional Futebol Clube|Nacional]] || [[Manaus]] || 2009 [[Campeonato Amazonense|State Championship]] runners-up
|-
| rowspan="2" | {{flag|Bahia}} || [[Esporte Clube Vitória|Vitória]]|| [[Salvador, Bahia|Salvador]] || 2009 [[Campeonato Baiano|State Championship]] winners
|-
| [[Esporte Clube Bahia|Bahia]] || [[Salvador, Bahia|Salvador]] || 2009 [[Campeonato Baiano|State Championship]] runners-up
|-
| rowspan="2" | {{flag|Ceará}} || [[Fortaleza Esporte Clube|Fortaleza]] || [[Fortaleza]] || 2009 [[Campeonato Cearense|State Championship]] winners
|-
| [[Ceará Sporting Club|Ceará]] || [[Fortaleza]] || 2009 [[Campeonato Cearense|State Championship]] runners-up
|-
| rowspan="2" | {{flag|Distrito Federal (Brazil)}} || [[Brasiliense Futebol Clube|Brasiliense]] || [[Brasília]] || 2009 [[Campeonato Brasiliense|State Championship]] winners
|-
| [[Brasília Futebol Clube|Brasília]] || [[Brasília]] || 2009 [[Campeonato Brasiliense|State Championship]] runners-up
|-
| rowspan="2" | {{flag|Espírito Santo}} || [[Associação Atlética São Mateus|São Mateus]] || [[São Mateus, Espírito Santo|São Mateus]] || 2009 [[Campeonato Capixaba|State Championship]] winners
|-
| [[Vitória Futebol Clube (ES)|Vitória]] || [[Vitória, Brazil|Vitória]] || 2009 [[Copa Espírito Santo]] winners
|-
| rowspan="2" | {{flag|Goiás}} || [[Goiás Esporte Clube|Goiás]] || [[Goiânia]] || 2009 [[Campeonato Goiano|State Championship]] winners
|-
| [[Atlético Clube Goianiense|Atlético Goianiense]] || [[Goiânia]] || 2009 [[Campeonato Goiano|State Championship]] runners-up
|-
| rowspan="2" | {{flag|Maranhão}} || [[JV Lideral Futebol Clube|JV Lideral]] || [[Imperatriz]] || 2009 [[Campeonato Maranhense|State Championship]] winners
|-
| [[Sampaio Corrêa Futebol Clube|Sampaio Corrêa]] || [[São Luís, Maranhão|São Luís]] || 2009 [[Taça Cidade de São Luís]] winners
|-
| rowspan="2" | {{flag|Mato Grosso}} || [[Luverdense Esporte Clube|Luverdense]] || [[Lucas do Rio Verde]] || 2009 [[Campeonato Matogrossense|State Championship]] winners
|-
| [[Araguaia Atlético Clube|Araguaia]] || [[Alto Araguaia]] || 2009 [[Campeonato Matogrossense|State Championship]] runners-up
|-
| rowspan="2" | {{flag|Mato Grosso do Sul}} || [[Clube Esportivo Naviraiense|Naviraiense]] || [[Naviraí]] || 2009 [[Campeonato Sul-Matogrossense|State Championship]] winners
|-
| [[Ivinhema Futebol Clube|Ivinhema]] || [[Ivinhema]] || 2009 [[Campeonato Sul-Matogrossense|State Championship]] runners-up
|-
| rowspan="3" | {{flag|Minas Gerais}} || [[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético Mineiro]] || [[Belo Horizonte]] || [[Campeonato Mineiro 2009|2009 State Championship]] runners-up
|-
| [[Ituiutaba Esporte Clube|Ituiutaba]] || [[Ituiutaba]] || [[Campeonato Mineiro 2009|2009 State Championship]] 3rd place
|-
| [[Uberaba Sport Club|Uberaba]] || [[Uberaba]] || 2009 [[Taça Minas Gerais]] winners
|-
| rowspan="2" | {{flag|Pará}} || [[Paysandu Sport Club|Paysandu]] || [[Belém]] || 2009 [[Campeonato Paraense|State Championship]] winners
|-
| [[São Raimundo Esporte Clube (PA)|São Raimundo]] || [[Santarém, Brazil|Santarém]] || 2009 [[Campeonato Paraense|State Championship]] runners-up
|-
| rowspan="2" | {{flag|Paraíba}} || [[Sousa Esporte Clube|Sousa]] || [[Sousa, Paraíba|Sousa]] || 2009 [[Campeonato Paraibano|State Championship]] winners
|-
| [[Treze Futebol Clube|Treze]] || [[Campina Grande]] || 2009 [[Copa Paraiba]] winners
|-
| rowspan="3" | {{flag|Paraná}} || [[Clube Atlético Paranaense|Atlético Paranaense]] || [[Curitiba]] || 2009 [[Campeonato Paranaense|State Championship]] winners
|-
| [[Sport Club Corinthians Paranaense|Corinthians Paranaense]] || [[São José dos Pinhais]] || 2009 [[Campeonato Paranaense|State Championship]] runners-up
|-
| [[Londrina Esporte Clube|Londrina]] || [[Londrina]] || 2008 [[Copa Paraná]] winners
|-
| rowspan="2" | {{flag|Pernambuco}} || [[Sport Club do Recife|Sport Recife]] || [[Recife]] || [[Campeonato Pernambucano 2009|2009 State Championship]] winners
|-
| [[Clube Náutico Capibaribe|Náutico]] || [[Recife]] || [[Campeonato Pernambucano 2009|2009 State Championship]] runners-up
|-
| rowspan="2" | {{flag|Piauí}} || [[Esporte Clube Flamengo|Flamengo]] || [[Teresina]] || 2009 [[Campeonato Piauiense|State Championship]] winners
|-
| [[Sociedade Esportiva Picos|Picos]] || [[Picos]] || 2009 [[Copa Piauí]] runners-up
|-
| rowspan="3" | {{flag|Rio de Janeiro}} || [[Botafogo de Futebol e Regatas|Botafogo]] || [[Rio de Janeiro]] || [[Campeonato Carioca 2009|2009 State Championship]] runners-up
|-
| [[CR Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama]] || [[Rio de Janeiro]] || [[Campeonato Carioca 2009|2009 State Championship]] third place
|-
| [[Esporte Clube Tigres do Brasil|Tigres do Brasil]] || [[Duque de Caxias, Rio de Janeiro|Duque de Caxias]] || 2009 [[Copa Rio (National)|Copa Rio]] winners
|-
| rowspan="2" | {{flag|Rio Grande do Norte}} || [[Associação Sportiva Sociedade Unida|ASSU]] || [[Assú]] || 2009 [[Campeonato Potiguar|State Championship]] winners
|-
| [[Associação Cultural e Desportiva Potyguar Seridoense|Potyguar Seridoense]] || [[Currais Novos]] || 2009 [[Campeonato Potiguar|State Championship]] runners-up
|-
| rowspan="3" | {{flag|Rio Grande do Sul}} || [[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio]] || [[Porto Alegre]] || [[Campeonato Gaúcho 2009|2009 State Championship]] runners-up
|-
| [[Ypiranga Futebol Clube|Ypiranga]] || [[Erechim]] || [[Campeonato Gaúcho 2009|2009 State Championship]] third place
|-
| [[Cerâmica Atlético Clube|Cerâmica]] || [[Gravataí]] || 2008 [[Copa FGF]] runners-up
|-
| {{flag|Rondônia}} || [[Vilhena Esporte Clube|Vilhena]] || [[Vilhena]] || 2009 [[Campeonato Rondoniense|Championship]] winners
|-
| {{flag|Roraima}} || [[Atlético Roraima Clube|Atlético Roraima]] || [[Boa Vista, Roraima|Boa Vista]] || 2009 [[Campeonato Roraimense|State Championship]] winners
|-
| rowspan="3" | {{flag|São Paulo}} || [[Santos FC|Santos]] || [[Santos, São Paulo|Santos]] || [[Campeonato Paulista 2009|2009 State Championship]] runners-up
|-
| [[Sociedade Esportiva Palmeiras|Palmeiras]] || [[São Paulo]] || [[Campeonato Paulista 2009|2009 State Championship]] third place
|-
| [[Votoraty Futebol Clube|Votoraty]]  ||  [[Votorantim]] || 2009 [[Copa Paulista de Futebol|Copa Paulista]] winners
|-
| rowspan="2" | {{flag|Santa Catarina}} || [[Avaí Futebol Clube|Avaí]] || [[Florianópolis]] || [[Campeonato Catarinense 2009|2009 State Championship]] winners
|-
| [[Associação Chapecoense de Futebol|Chapecoense]] || [[Chapecó]] || [[Campeonato Catarinense 2009|2009 State Championship]] runners-up
|-
| rowspan="2" | {{flag|Sergipe}} || [[Associação Desportiva Confiança|Confiança]] || [[Aracaju]] || 2009 [[Campeonato Sergipano|State Championship]] winners
|-
| [[São Domingos Futebol Clube|São Domingos]] || [[São Domingos, Sergipe|São Domingos]] || 2009 [[Copa Governo de Sergipe]] winners
|-
| {{flag|Tocantins}} || [[Araguaína Futebol e Regatas|Araguaína]] || [[Araguaína]] || 2009 [[Campeonato Tocantinense|State Championship]] winners
|}

===Qualified by CBF club ranking===
Ten spots are reserved for the top 10 clubs in [[Brazilian Football Confederation|CBF]] club ranking, excluding those qualified by state competitions and clubs playing in [[2010 Copa Libertadores]].<ref>[http://www.cbf.com.br/ranking/ranking.pdf CBF Club Ranking - official site] {{webarchive|url=https://web.archive.org/web/20090117065212/http://www.cbf.com.br/ranking/ranking.pdf |date=2009-01-17 }}</ref>

{| class="wikitable"
!width=28| Pos
! Team
! City
! State
! Points
|-
|align=center| 11 || [[Fluminense Football Club|Fluminense]] || [[Rio de Janeiro]] || {{flag|Rio de Janeiro}} ||align=right| 1,658
|-
|align=center| 14 || [[Coritiba Foot Ball Club|Coritiba]] || [[Curitiba]] || {{flag|Paraná}} ||align=right| 1,473
|-
|align=center| 15 || [[Guarani Futebol Clube|Guarani]] || [[Campinas]] || {{flag|São Paulo}} ||align=right| 1,470
|-
|align=center| 17 || [[Associação Portuguesa de Desportos|Portuguesa]] || [[São Paulo]] || {{flag|São Paulo}} ||align=right| 1,366
|-
|align=center| 22 || [[Santa Cruz Futebol Clube|Santa Cruz]] || [[Recife]]  || {{flag|Pernambuco}} ||align=right| 1,136
|-
|align=center| 23 || [[Paraná Clube|Paraná]] || [[Curitiba]] || {{flag|Paraná}} ||align=right| 1,044
|-
|align=center| 24 || [[Associação Atlética Ponte Preta|Ponte Preta]] || [[Campinas]] || {{flag|São Paulo}} ||align=right| 1,038
|-
|align=center| 26 || [[Esporte Clube Juventude|Juventude]] || [[Caxias do Sul]] || {{flag|Rio Grande do Sul}} ||align=right| 865
|-
|align=center| 27 || [[Clube do Remo|Remo]] || [[Belém]] || {{flag|Pará}} ||align=right| 852
|-
|align=center| 29 || [[América Futebol Clube (RN)|América (RN)]] || [[Natal, Rio Grande do Norte|Natal]] || {{flag|Rio Grande do Norte}} ||align=right| 703
|}

==Brackets==
Teams that play in their home stadium in the first leg are marked with †.

===Section 1===
{{16TeamBracket|legs=2|aggregate=y|seeds=n
| RD1= First Round
| RD2= Second Round
| RD3= Round of 16
| RD4= Quarterfinals
| RD1-team01={{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} '''[[CR Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama]]'''
| RD1-score01-1=2
| RD1-score01-2=0
| RD1-score01-agg=2
| RD1-team02={{flagicon|Paraíba}} [[Sousa Esporte Clube|Sousa]] †
| RD1-score02-1=1
| RD1-score02-2=0
| RD1-score02-agg=1
| RD1-team03={{flagicon|Amazonas}} [[Nacional Futebol Clube|Nacional]]
| RD1-score03-1=0
| RD1-score03-2=2
| RD1-score03-agg=2
| RD1-team04={{flagicon|Alagoas}} '''[[Agremiação Sportiva Arapiraquense|ASA]]''' † ([[Away goals rule|a]])
| RD1-score04-1=0
| RD1-score04-2=2
| RD1-score04-agg=2
| RD1-team05={{flagicon|Ceará}} '''[[Ceará Sporting Club|Ceará]]'''
| RD1-score05-1=5
| RD1-score05-2=-
| RD1-score05-agg=5
| RD1-team06={{flagicon|Piauí}} [[Sociedade Esportiva Picos|Picos]] †
| RD1-score06-1=0
| RD1-score06-2=-
| RD1-score06-agg=0
| RD1-team07={{flagicon|Rio Grande do Sul}} [[Esporte Clube Juventude|Juventude]]
| RD1-score07-1=0
| RD1-score07-2=0
| RD1-score07-agg=0
| RD1-team08={{flagicon|Paraná}} '''[[Sport Club Corinthians Paranaense|Corinthians Paranaense]]''' †
| RD1-score08-1=1
| RD1-score08-2=1
| RD1-score08-agg=2
| RD1-team09={{flagicon|Goiás}} '''[[Goiás Esporte Clube|Goiás]]'''
| RD1-score09-1=3
| RD1-score09-2=0
| RD1-score09-agg=3
| RD1-team10={{flagicon|Minas Gerais}} [[Ituiutaba Esporte Clube|Ituiutaba]] †
| RD1-score10-1=2
| RD1-score10-2=0
| RD1-score10-agg=2
| RD1-team11={{flagicon|Rio Grande do Norte}} [[América Futebol Clube (RN)|América]]
| RD1-score11-1=1
| RD1-score11-2=0
| RD1-score11-agg=1
| RD1-team12={{flagicon|Amapá}} '''[[Sociedade Esportiva e Recreativa São José|São José]]''' †
| RD1-score12-1=1
| RD1-score12-2=1
| RD1-score12-agg=2
| RD1-team13={{flagicon|Bahia}} '''[[Esporte Clube Vitória|Vitória]]'''
| RD1-score13-1=1
| RD1-score13-2=4
| RD1-score13-agg=5
| RD1-team14={{flagicon|Alagoas}} [[Sport Club Corinthians Alagoano|Corinthians Alagoano]] †
| RD1-score14-1=3
| RD1-score14-2=0
| RD1-score14-agg=3
| RD1-team15={{flagicon|Pernambuco}} '''[[Clube Náutico Capibaribe|Náutico]]'''
| RD1-score15-1=1
| RD1-score15-2=3
| RD1-score15-agg=4
| RD1-team16={{flagicon|Mato Grosso do Sul}} [[Ivinhema Futebol Clube|Ivinhema]] †
| RD1-score16-1=1
| RD1-score16-2=1
| RD1-score16-agg=2
| RD2-team01={{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} '''[[CR Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama]]'''
| RD2-score01-1=1
| RD2-score01-2=3
| RD2-score01-agg=4
| RD2-team02={{flagicon|Alagoas}} [[Agremiação Sportiva Arapiraquense|ASA]] †
| RD2-score02-1=1
| RD2-score02-2=1
| RD2-score02-agg=2
| RD2-team03={{flagicon|Ceará}} [[Ceará Sporting Club|Ceará]]
| RD2-score03-1=1
| RD2-score03-2=1
| RD2-score03-agg=2
| RD2-team04={{flagicon|Paraná}} '''[[Sport Club Corinthians Paranaense|Corinthians Paranaense]]''' †
| RD2-score04-1=2
| RD2-score04-2=1
| RD2-score04-agg=3
| RD2-team05={{flagicon|Goiás}} '''[[Goiás Esporte Clube|Goiás]]'''
| RD2-score05-1=1
| RD2-score05-2=7
| RD2-score05-agg=8
| RD2-team06={{flagicon|Amapá}} [[Sociedade Esportiva e Recreativa São José|São José]] †
| RD2-score06-1=0
| RD2-score06-2=0
| RD2-score06-agg=0
| RD2-team07={{flagicon|Bahia}} '''[[Esporte Clube Vitória|Vitória]]'''
| RD2-score07-1=1
| RD2-score07-2=5
| RD2-score07-agg=6
| RD2-team08={{flagicon|Pernambuco}} [[Clube Náutico Capibaribe|Náutico]] †
| RD2-score08-1=0
| RD2-score08-2=0
| RD2-score08-agg=0
| RD3-team01={{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} '''[[CR Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama]]'''
| RD3-score01-1=1
| RD3-score01-2=2
| RD3-score01-agg=3
| RD3-team02={{flagicon|Paraná}} [[Sport Club Corinthians Paranaense|Corinthians Paranaense]] †
| RD3-score02-1=0
| RD3-score02-2=1
| RD3-score02-agg=1
| RD3-team03={{flagicon|Goiás}} [[Goiás Esporte Clube|Goiás]]
| RD3-score03-1=0
| RD3-score03-2=2
| RD3-score03-agg=2
| RD3-team04={{flagicon|Bahia}} '''[[Esporte Clube Vitória|Vitória]]''' †
| RD3-score04-1=4
| RD3-score04-2=2
| RD3-score04-agg=6
| RD4-team01={{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} [[CR Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama]]
| RD4-score01-1=0
| RD4-score01-2=3
| RD4-score01-agg=3
| RD4-team02={{flagicon|Bahia}} '''[[Esporte Clube Vitória|Vitória]]''' † ([[Away goals rule|a]])
| RD4-score02-1=2
| RD4-score02-2=1
| RD4-score02-agg=3
}}

===Section 2===
{{16TeamBracket|legs=2|aggregate=y|seeds=n
| RD1= First Round
| RD2= Second Round
| RD3= Round of 16
| RD4= Quarterfinals
| RD1-team01={{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} '''[[Fluminense Football Club|Fluminense]]'''
| RD1-score01-1=1
| RD1-score01-2=2
| RD1-score01-agg=3
| RD1-team02={{flagicon|Sergipe}} [[Associação Desportiva Confiança|Confiança]] †
| RD1-score02-1=1
| RD1-score02-2=0
| RD1-score02-agg=1
| RD1-team03={{flagicon|Paraná}} [[Londrina Esporte Clube|Londrina]]
| RD1-score03-1=0
| RD1-score03-2=0
| RD1-score03-agg=0
| RD1-team04={{flagicon|Minas Gerais}} '''[[Uberaba Sport Club|Uberaba]]''' †
| RD1-score04-1=1
| RD1-score04-2=2
| RD1-score04-agg=3
| RD1-team05={{flagicon|São Paulo}} '''[[Associação Portuguesa de Desportos|Portuguesa]]'''
| RD1-score05-1=7
| RD1-score05-2=-
| RD1-score05-agg=7
| RD1-team06={{flagicon|Roraima}} [[Atlético Roraima Clube|Atlético Roraima]] †
| RD1-score06-1=0
| RD1-score06-2=-
| RD1-score06-agg=0
| RD1-team07={{flagicon|São Paulo}} '''[[Associação Atlética Ponte Preta|Ponte Preta]]'''
| RD1-score07-1=0
| RD1-score07-2=4
| RD1-score07-agg=4
| RD1-team08={{flagicon|Maranhão}} [[JV Lideral Futebol Clube|JV Lideral]] †
| RD1-score08-1=0
| RD1-score08-2=0
| RD1-score08-agg=0
| RD1-team09={{flagicon|Rio Grande do Sul}} '''[[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio]]'''
| RD1-score09-1=3
| RD1-score09-2=-
| RD1-score09-agg=3
| RD1-team10={{flagicon|Mato Grosso}} [[Araguaia Atlético Clube|Araguaia]] †
| RD1-score10-1=1
| RD1-score10-2=-
| RD1-score10-agg=1
| RD1-team11={{flagicon|Paraíba}} [[Treze Futebol Clube|Treze]]
| RD1-score11-1=0
| RD1-score11-2=2
| RD1-score11-agg=2
| RD1-team12={{flagicon|São Paulo}} '''[[Votoraty Futebol Clube|Votoraty]]''' †
| RD1-score12-1=4
| RD1-score12-2=1
| RD1-score12-agg=5
| RD1-team13={{flagicon|Paraná}} '''[[Coritiba Foot Ball Club|Coritiba]]'''
| RD1-score13-1=1
| RD1-score13-2=1
| RD1-score13-agg=2
| RD1-team14={{flagicon|Mato Grosso}} [[Luverdense Esporte Clube|Luverdense]] †
| RD1-score14-1=0
| RD1-score14-2=0
| RD1-score14-agg=0
| RD1-team15={{flagicon|Santa Catarina}} '''[[Avaí Futebol Clube|Avaí]]'''
| RD1-score15-1=3
| RD1-score15-2=-
| RD1-score15-agg=3
| RD1-team16={{flagicon|Rio Grande do Sul}} [[Ypiranga Futebol Clube|Ypiranga]] †
| RD1-score16-1=0
| RD1-score16-2=-
| RD1-score16-agg=0
| RD2-team01={{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} '''[[Fluminense Football Club|Fluminense]]'''
| RD2-score01-1=2
| RD2-score01-2=-
| RD2-score01-agg=2
| RD2-team02={{flagicon|Minas Gerais}} [[Uberaba Sport Club|Uberaba]] †
| RD2-score02-1=0
| RD2-score02-2=-
| RD2-score02-agg=0
| RD2-team03={{flagicon|São Paulo}} '''[[Associação Portuguesa de Desportos|Portuguesa]]'''
| RD2-score03-1=1
| RD2-score03-2=2
| RD2-score03-agg=3
| RD2-team04={{flagicon|São Paulo}} [[Associação Atlética Ponte Preta|Ponte Preta]] †
| RD2-score04-1=1
| RD2-score04-2=1
| RD2-score04-agg=2
| RD2-team05={{flagicon|Rio Grande do Sul}} '''[[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio]]'''
| RD2-score05-1=1
| RD2-score05-2=3
| RD2-score05-agg=4
| RD2-team06={{flagicon|São Paulo}} [[Votoraty Futebol Clube|Votoraty]] †
| RD2-score06-1=0
| RD2-score06-2=0
| RD2-score06-agg=0
| RD2-team07={{flagicon|Paraná}} [[Coritiba Foot Ball Club|Coritiba]]
| RD2-score07-1=1
| RD2-score07-2=0
| RD2-score07-agg=1
| RD2-team08={{flagicon|Santa Catarina}} '''[[Avaí Futebol Clube|Avaí]]''' †
| RD2-score08-1=1
| RD2-score08-2=1
| RD2-score08-agg=2
| RD3-team01={{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} '''[[Fluminense Football Club|Fluminense]]'''
| RD3-score01-1=1
| RD3-score01-2=3
| RD3-score01-agg=4
| RD3-team02={{flagicon|São Paulo}} [[Associação Portuguesa de Desportos|Portuguesa]] †
| RD3-score02-1=0
| RD3-score02-2=2
| RD3-score02-agg=2
| RD3-team03={{flagicon|Rio Grande do Sul}} '''[[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio]]''' †
| RD3-score03-1=3
| RD3-score03-2=2
| RD3-score03-agg=5
| RD3-team04={{flagicon|Santa Catarina}} [[Avaí Futebol Clube|Avaí]]
| RD3-score04-1=1
| RD3-score04-2=3
| RD3-score04-agg=4
| RD4-team01={{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} [[Fluminense Football Club|Fluminense]] †
| RD4-score01-1=2
| RD4-score01-2=0
| RD4-score01-agg=2
| RD4-team02={{flagicon|Rio Grande do Sul}} '''[[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio]]'''
| RD4-score02-1=3
| RD4-score02-2=2
| RD4-score02-agg=5
}}

===Section 3===
{{16TeamBracket|legs=2|aggregate=y|seeds=n
| RD1= First Round
| RD2= Second Round
| RD3= Round of 16
| RD4= Quarterfinals
| RD1-team01={{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} '''[[Botafogo de Futebol e Regatas|Botafogo]]'''
| RD1-score01-1=0
| RD1-score01-2=4
| RD1-score01-agg=4
| RD1-team02={{flagicon|Pará}} [[São Raimundo Esporte Clube (PA)|São Raimundo]]{{Ref|A|[a]}} †
| RD1-score02-1=1
| RD1-score02-2=3
| RD1-score02-agg=4
| RD1-team03={{flagicon|Pernambuco}} '''[[Santa Cruz Futebol Clube|Santa Cruz]]'''
| RD1-score03-1=1
| RD1-score03-2=3
| RD1-score03-agg=4
| RD1-team04={{flagicon|Amazonas}} [[América Futebol Clube (AM)|América]] †
| RD1-score04-1=0
| RD1-score04-2=0
| RD1-score04-agg=0
| RD1-team05={{flagicon|Bahia}} '''[[Esporte Clube Bahia|Bahia]]'''
| RD1-score05-1=2
| RD1-score05-2=-
| RD1-score05-agg=2
| RD1-team06={{flagicon|Espírito Santo}} [[Vitória Futebol Clube (ES)|Vitória]] †
| RD1-score06-1=0
| RD1-score06-2=-
| RD1-score06-agg=0
| RD1-team07={{flagicon|Goiás}} '''[[Atlético Clube Goianiense|Atlético Goianiense]]'''
| RD1-score07-1=3
| RD1-score07-2=-
| RD1-score07-agg=3
| RD1-team08={{flagicon|Rio Grande do Norte}} [[Associação Sportiva Sociedade Unida|ASSU]] †
| RD1-score08-1=0
| RD1-score08-2=-
| RD1-score08-agg=0
| RD1-team09={{flagicon|São Paulo}} '''[[Sociedade Esportiva Palmeiras|Palmeiras]]'''
| RD1-score09-1=1
| RD1-score09-2=4
| RD1-score09-agg=5
| RD1-team10={{flagicon|Piauí}} [[Esporte Clube Flamengo|Flamengo]] †
| RD1-score10-1=0
| RD1-score10-2=0
| RD1-score10-agg=0
| RD1-team11={{flagicon|Pará}} '''[[Paysandu Sport Club|Paysandu]]'''
| RD1-score11-1=0
| RD1-score11-2=3
| RD1-score11-agg=3
| RD1-team12={{flagicon|Rio Grande do Norte}} [[Associação Cultural e Desportiva Potyguar Seridoense|Potyguar Seridoense]] †
| RD1-score12-1=0
| RD1-score12-2=1
| RD1-score12-agg=1
| RD1-team13={{flagicon|Paraná}} '''[[Clube Atlético Paranaense|Atlético Paranaense]]'''
| RD1-score13-1=2
| RD1-score13-2=4
| RD1-score13-agg=6
| RD1-team14={{flagicon|Rondônia}} [[Vilhena Esporte Clube|Vilhena]] †
| RD1-score14-1=2
| RD1-score14-2=0
| RD1-score14-agg=2
| RD1-team15={{flagicon|Maranhão}} '''[[Sampaio Corrêa Futebol Clube|Sampaio Corrêa]]'''
| RD1-score15-1=1
| RD1-score15-2=2
| RD1-score15-agg=3
| RD1-team16={{flagicon|Sergipe}} [[São Domingos Futebol Clube|São Domingos]] †
| RD1-score16-1=1
| RD1-score16-2=1
| RD1-score16-agg=2
| RD2-team01={{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} [[Botafogo de Futebol e Regatas|Botafogo]]
| RD2-score01-1=1
| RD2-score01-2=2
| RD2-score01-agg=3
| RD2-team02={{flagicon|Pernambuco}} '''[[Santa Cruz Futebol Clube|Santa Cruz]]''' † ([[Away goals rule|a]])
| RD2-score02-1=0
| RD2-score02-2=3
| RD2-score02-agg=3
| RD2-team03={{flagicon|Bahia}} [[Esporte Clube Bahia|Bahia]]
| RD2-score03-1=0
| RD2-score03-2=1
| RD2-score03-agg=1
| RD2-team04={{flagicon|Goiás}} '''[[Atlético Clube Goianiense|Atlético Goianiense]]''' †
| RD2-score04-1=2
| RD2-score04-2=0
| RD2-score04-agg=2
| RD2-team05={{flagicon|São Paulo}} '''[[Sociedade Esportiva Palmeiras|Palmeiras]]'''
| RD2-score05-1=2
| RD2-score05-2=1
| RD2-score05-agg=3
| RD2-team06={{flagicon|Pará}} [[Paysandu Sport Club|Paysandu]] †
| RD2-score06-1=1
| RD2-score06-2=0
| RD2-score06-agg=1
| RD2-team07={{flagicon|Paraná}} '''[[Clube Atlético Paranaense|Atlético Paranaense]]'''
| RD2-score07-1=1
| RD2-score07-2=2
| RD2-score07-agg=3
| RD2-team08={{flagicon|Maranhão}} [[Sampaio Corrêa Futebol Clube|Sampaio Corrêa]] †
| RD2-score08-1=1
| RD2-score08-2=0
| RD2-score08-agg=1
| RD3-team01={{flagicon|Pernambuco}} [[Santa Cruz Futebol Clube|Santa Cruz]] †
| RD3-score01-1=1
| RD3-score01-2=0
| RD3-score01-agg=1
| RD3-team02={{flagicon|Goiás}} '''[[Atlético Clube Goianiense|Atlético Goianiense]]'''
| RD3-score02-1=2
| RD3-score02-2=2
| RD3-score02-agg=4
| RD3-team03={{flagicon|São Paulo}} '''[[Sociedade Esportiva Palmeiras|Palmeiras]]''' †
| RD3-score03-1=1
| RD3-score03-2=1
| RD3-score03-agg=2
| RD3-team04={{flagicon|Paraná}} [[Clube Atlético Paranaense|Atlético Paranaense]]
| RD3-score04-1=0
| RD3-score04-2=1
| RD3-score04-agg=1
| RD4-team01={{flagicon|Goiás}} '''[[Atlético Clube Goianiense|Atlético Goianiense]]''' ([[Penalty shootout (association football)|p]])
| RD4-score01-1=0
| RD4-score01-2=1
| RD4-score01-agg=1 (2)
| RD4-team02={{flagicon|São Paulo}} [[Sociedade Esportiva Palmeiras|Palmeiras]] †
| RD4-score02-1=1
| RD4-score02-2=0
| RD4-score02-agg=1 (1)
}}
{{ref begin}}
:{{note|A|{{nobold|[a]}}}} São Raimundo was penalized 3 points due to player irregular registration.
{{ref end}}

===Section 4===
{{16TeamBracket|legs=2|aggregate=y|seeds=n
| RD1= First Round
| RD2= Second Round
| RD3= Round of 16
| RD4= Quarterfinals
| RD1-team01={{flagicon|São Paulo}} '''[[Santos FC|Santos]]'''
| RD1-score01-1=1
| RD1-score01-2=10
| RD1-score01-agg=11
| RD1-team02={{flagicon|Mato Grosso do Sul}} [[Clube Esportivo Naviraiense|Naviraiense]] †
| RD1-score02-1=0
| RD1-score02-2=0
| RD1-score02-agg=0
| RD1-team03={{flagicon|Pará}} '''[[Clube do Remo|Remo]]'''
| RD1-score03-1=2
| RD1-score03-2=4
| RD1-score03-agg=6
| RD1-team04={{flagicon|Espírito Santo}} [[Associação Atlética São Mateus|São Mateus]] †
| RD1-score04-1=1
| RD1-score04-2=1
| RD1-score04-agg=2
| RD1-team05={{flagicon|São Paulo}} '''[[Guarani Futebol Clube|Guarani]]'''
| RD1-score05-1=1
| RD1-score05-2=2
| RD1-score05-agg=3
| RD1-team06={{flagicon|Tocantins}} [[Araguaína Futebol e Regatas|Araguaína]] †
| RD1-score06-1=0
| RD1-score06-2=1
| RD1-score06-agg=1
| RD1-team07={{flagicon|Ceará}} '''[[Fortaleza Esporte Clube|Fortaleza]]'''
| RD1-score07-1=2
| RD1-score07-2=3
| RD1-score07-agg=5
| RD1-team08={{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} [[Esporte Clube Tigres do Brasil|Tigres do Brasil]] †
| RD1-score08-1=2
| RD1-score08-2=2
| RD1-score08-agg=4
| RD1-team09={{flagicon|Minas Gerais}} '''[[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético Mineiro]]'''
| RD1-score09-1=7
| RD1-score09-2=-
| RD1-score09-agg=7
| RD1-team10={{flagicon|Acre}} [[Atlético Clube Juventus|Juventus]] †
| RD1-score10-1=0
| RD1-score10-2=-
| RD1-score10-agg=0
| RD1-team11={{flagicon|Distrito Federal (Brazil)}} [[Brasiliense Futebol Clube|Brasiliense]]
| RD1-score11-1=0
| RD1-score11-2=2
| RD1-score11-agg=2
| RD1-team12={{flagicon|Santa Catarina}} '''[[Associação Chapecoense de Futebol|Chapecoense]]''' †
| RD1-score12-1=3
| RD1-score12-2=1
| RD1-score12-agg=4
| RD1-team13={{flagicon|Pernambuco}} '''[[Sport Club do Recife|Sport Recife]]'''
| RD1-score13-1=4
| RD1-score13-2=-
| RD1-score13-agg=4
| RD1-team14={{flagicon|Distrito Federal (Brazil)}} [[Brasília Futebol Clube|Brasília]] †
| RD1-score14-1=2
| RD1-score14-2=-
| RD1-score14-agg=2
| RD1-team15={{flagicon|Paraná}} '''[[Paraná Clube|Paraná]]'''
| RD1-score15-1=1
| RD1-score15-2=6
| RD1-score15-agg=7
| RD1-team16={{flagicon|Rio Grande do Sul}} [[Cerâmica Atlético Clube|Cerâmica]] †
| RD1-score16-1=1
| RD1-score16-2=1
| RD1-score16-agg=2
| RD2-team01={{flagicon|São Paulo}} '''[[Santos FC|Santos]]'''
| RD2-score01-1=4
| RD2-score01-2=-
| RD2-score01-agg=4
| RD2-team02={{flagicon|Pará}} [[Clube do Remo|Remo]] †
| RD2-score02-1=0
| RD2-score02-2=-
| RD2-score02-agg=0
| RD2-team03={{flagicon|São Paulo}} '''[[Guarani Futebol Clube|Guarani]]''' ([[Penalty shootout (association football)|p]])
| RD2-score03-1=0
| RD2-score03-2=2
| RD2-score03-agg=2 (4)
| RD2-team04={{flagicon|Ceará}} [[Fortaleza Esporte Clube|Fortaleza]] †
| RD2-score04-1=2
| RD2-score04-2=0
| RD2-score04-agg=2 (3)
| RD2-team05={{flagicon|Minas Gerais}} '''[[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético Mineiro]]'''
| RD2-score05-1=0
| RD2-score05-2=6
| RD2-score05-agg=6
| RD2-team06={{flagicon|Santa Catarina}} [[Associação Chapecoense de Futebol|Chapecoense]] †
| RD2-score06-1=1
| RD2-score06-2=0
| RD2-score06-agg=1
| RD2-team07={{flagicon|Pernambuco}} '''[[Sport Club do Recife|Sport Recife]]'''
| RD2-score07-1=1
| RD2-score07-2=1
| RD2-score07-agg=2
| RD2-team08={{flagicon|Paraná}} [[Paraná Clube|Paraná]] †
| RD2-score08-1=1
| RD2-score08-2=0
| RD2-score08-agg=1
 
| RD3-team01={{flagicon|São Paulo}} '''[[Santos FC|Santos]]'''
| RD3-score01-1=8
| RD3-score01-2=2
| RD3-score01-agg=10
| RD3-team02={{flagicon|São Paulo}} [[Guarani Futebol Clube|Guarani]] †
| RD3-score02-1=1
| RD3-score02-2=3
| RD3-score02-agg=4
| RD3-team03={{flagicon|Minas Gerais}} '''[[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético Mineiro]]'''
| RD3-score03-1=1
| RD3-score03-2=2
| RD3-score03-agg=3
| RD3-team04={{flagicon|Pernambuco}} [[Sport Club do Recife|Sport Recife]] †
| RD3-score04-1=0
| RD3-score04-2=0
| RD3-score04-agg=0
| RD4-team01={{flagicon|São Paulo}} '''[[Santos FC|Santos]]'''
| RD4-score01-1=2
| RD4-score01-2=3
| RD4-score01-agg=5
| RD4-team02={{flagicon|Minas Gerais}} [[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético Mineiro]] †
| RD4-score02-1=3
| RD4-score02-2=1
| RD4-score02-agg=4
}}

===Final phase===
{{4TeamBracket-2legs
| RD1=Semifinals
| RD2=Final
| RD1-seed1=
| RD1-team1={{flagicon|Bahia}} '''[[Esporte Clube Vitória|Vitória]]'''
| RD1-score1-1=0
| RD1-score1-2=4
| RD1-score1-A='''4'''
| RD1-seed2=
| RD1-team2={{flagicon|Goiás}} [[Atlético Clube Goianiense|Atlético Goianiense]] †
| RD1-score2-1=1
| RD1-score2-2=0
| RD1-score2-A='''1'''
| RD1-seed3=
| RD1-team3={{flagicon|Rio Grande do Sul}} [[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio]] †
| RD1-score3-1=4
| RD1-score3-2=1
| RD1-score3-A='''5'''
| RD1-seed4=
| RD1-team4={{flagicon|São Paulo}} '''[[Santos FC|Santos]]'''
| RD1-score4-1=3
| RD1-score4-2=3
| RD1-score4-A='''6'''
| RD2-seed1=
| RD2-team1={{flagicon|Bahia}} [[Esporte Clube Vitória|Vitória]] †
| RD2-score1-1=0
| RD2-score1-2=2
| RD2-score1-A=2
| RD2-seed2=
| RD2-team2={{flagicon|São Paulo}} '''[[Santos FC|Santos]]''' 
| RD2-score2-1=2
| RD2-score2-2=1
| RD2-score2-A=3
}}

{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center; margin: 0 auto;"
|-
!Copa do Brasil<br />2010 Champion
|-
|{{flagicon|São Paulo|size=100px}}<br>'''[[Santos FC|Santos]]'''<br/>'''1st Title'''
|}

==References==
{{reflist}}

==External links==

{{Copa do Brasil Seasons}}
{{2010 in Brazilian football}}
{{2010 in South American Football (CONMEBOL)}}

{{DEFAULTSORT:Copa Do Brasil 2010}}
[[Category:2010 in domestic association football cups]]
[[Category:Copa do Brasil seasons|2010]]
[[Category:2010 Brazilian football competitions]]
